title: Public opinion research firm must better inform survey respondents about their personal information use; refrain from collecting full birth dates
summary: 2. The complainant is a member an online survey panel (a.k.a. a “forum”). She states that, in order to be registered as a member and receive monthly surveys, she originally provided basic demographic data including her complete date of birth.
dedupKey: public opinion research firm must better inform survey respondents about their personal information use refrain from collecting full birth dates|2011-06-30
